search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20067` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" $advanced_filter$ | eval snmps=input_snmp+","+output_snmp | eval snmps=split(snmps,",") | `sampling(packets_in)` | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(packets_in) as sumpacketsin by exp_ip snmps _time nfo_hostname sum_by_exp | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmountBoth sparkline(sum(sumbytes)) as TrafficLine sparkline(sum(sumpacketsin)) as PacketsLine sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount max(avgbits) as MaxTrafficBoth by exp_ip snmps nfo_hostname sum_by_exp | lookup `is_local_lookup` watched_interfaces_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT if_name | `get_iface_name(snmp_name, snmps)` | `get_iface_speed(snmp_speed, snmps)` | where snmp_name=if_name | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" snmp_name exp_snmp | eval pct = TrafficAmountBoth*100/sum_by_exp | eval pct = pct/2 | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | eval AverageSpeedBoth=(TrafficAmountBoth)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeedBoth=AverageSpeedBoth/1000000 | eval TrafficAmountBoth=TrafficAmountBoth/1024/1024 | eval MaxTrafficBoth=MaxTrafficBoth/1000000 | eval percOfUsageBoth = round(TrafficSpeedBoth/(snmp_speed*1000000)*100, 2) | sort - percOfUsageBoth TrafficSpeedBoth | head 100 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps Both, TrafficSpeedBoth, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps Both, MaxTrafficBoth, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | table exp_snmp "Max Mbps Both" "Average Mbps Both" percOfUsageBoth TrafficLine pct "Average Packets/s" PacketsLine | rename TrafficLine as "Traffic Line" | rename PacketsLine as "Packets Line" | rename exp_snmp as "Device/Interface" | rename percOfUsageBoth as "% of Usage Both" | rename pct as "% of Total"

`netflow_search_rule_20067` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" $advanced_filter$ | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | `sampling(packets_in)` | eval DirectionIN=if(exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$","In","") | eval DirectionOUT=if(exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$","Out","") | eval Direction=DirectionIN+","+DirectionOUT | makemv Direction delim="," | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(packets_in) as sumpacketsin by exp_ip Direction _time | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sparkline(sum(sumbytes)) as TrafficLine sparkline(sum(sumpacketsin)) as PacketsLine sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount max(avgbits) as Max min(avgbits) as Min stdev(avgbits) as StDev by exp_ip Direction | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed = AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval Max = Max/1000000 | eval Min = Min/1000000 | eval StDev = StDev/1000000 | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp | eval pct = pct/2 | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, Max, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Min Mbps, Min, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Standard Deviation Mbps, StDev, 2)` | table Direction "Max Mbps" "Min Mbps" "Standard Deviation Mbps" "Average Mbps" TrafficLine pct "Average Packets/s" PacketsLine | rename TrafficLine as "Traffic Line" | rename PacketsLine as "Packets Line" | rename pct as "% of Total"

`netflow_search_rule_20067` $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(packets_in)` | eval DirectionIN=if(exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$","In","") | eval DirectionOUT=if(exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$","Out","") | eval Direction=DirectionIN+","+DirectionOUT | makemv Direction delim="," | `per_second_chart(sum(bytes_in) by Direction,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20067` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" $advanced_filter$ | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eval exp_snmp_dir = "$Device/Interface$/$Direction$" | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name "/Out" exp_osnmp | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name "/In" exp_isnmp | where (exp_snmp_dir == exp_isnmp) OR (exp_snmp_dir == exp_osnmp) | `sampling(packets_in)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | fillnull value="" transport | `conversation(TrafficAmount,"$span_token$",$span_int$,$range$)`

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range and/or there is no watched-interfaces.csv lookup file and/or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module "10067: Top Traffic Monitor" (syslogs with nfc_id=20067). This Module identifies hosts with the most traffic. It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol, Input interface, Output interface. This Module is packaged in NFO "Network Traffic and Devices Monitor" Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
This dashboard requires watched-interfaces.csv lookup file.
Please create watched-interfaces.csv lookup file, where:

tr.td: is the exporter IP address of the device
is the name of the interface (received from SNMP polling)
